documentation.file_docstring: Calculate suggested retry delay based on consecutive no-output poll count. Implements exponential backoff schedule: 5s → 10s → 30s → 60s (capped).
header_comments: Exponential backoff schedule for command polling
inline_comments: Record a command poll and return suggested retry delay. @param state Session state to track polling in @param commandId Unique identifier for the command being polled @param hasNewOutput Whether this poll returned new output @returns Suggested delay in milliseconds before next poll
Get current suggested backoff for a command without modifying state. Useful for checking current backoff level.
Reset poll count for a command (e.g., when command completes).
Prune stale command poll records (older than 1 hour). Call periodically to prevent memory bloat.

functions.name: calculateBackoffMs
functions.doc: Calculate suggested retry delay based on consecutive no-output poll count.   Implements exponential backoff schedule: 5s

functions.name: recordCommandPoll
functions.doc: Record a command poll and return suggested retry delay.    state Session state to track polling in    commandId Unique i

functions.name: getCommandPollSuggestion
functions.doc: Get current suggested backoff for a command without modifying state.   Useful for checking current backoff level.

functions.name: resetCommandPollCount
functions.doc: Reset poll count for a command (e.g., when command completes).

functions.name: pruneStaleCommandPolls
functions.doc: Prune stale command poll records (older than 1 hour).   Call periodically to prevent memory bloat.
